channel.title: galexrt aka Alexander
channel.description: Recent content on galexrt aka Alexander

item.title: about
item.description: Hello, I’m Alexander aka galexrt. I’m the Founding Engineer of Koor Technologies, Inc.. I am specialized in containerization, Kubernetes and storage using Rook and Ceph. In my spare time, I am a system administrator and developer with a passion for gaming, self hosting and, most importantly open source. I’m also working on the German Modern Gaming Multi-Gaming community, with over 10k members, as an infrastructure administrator. Checkout my blog at edenmal.

item.title: Impressum
item.description: The Privacy Policy / Datenschutz­erklärung can be found here: Privacy Policy / Datenschutz­erklärung page. German version of the Site Notice / Impressum below. Site Notice ¶ Information pursuant to Sect. 5 German Telemedia Act (TMG) ¶ Alexander Trost Postfach 11 75196 Kämpfelbach Germany Contact ¶ E-mail: galexrt@googlemail.com Responsible for the content according to Sect. 55, paragraph 2 RStV ¶ Alexander Trost Postfach 11 75196 Kämpfelbach Germany Liability for Contents ¶ As service providers, we are liable for own contents of these websites according to Paragraph 7, Sect.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description: The Site Notice / Impressum can be found here: Site Notice / Impressum page. German version of the Privacy Policy / Datenschutzerklärung below. Privacy Policy ¶ 1. An overview of data protection ¶ General information ¶ The following information will provide you with an easy to navigate overview of what will happen with your personal data when you visit this website. The term “personal data” comprises all data that can be used to personally identify you.
